sourceEvidence.notes: This is a CPU-only proxy pass over extracted Galaxian reference frames. It measures brightness and frame-difference motion regions from committed frame windows; it is not yet sprite tracking or optical flow.

runtimeTuningRead.reason: The frame proxy confirms the right evidence windows and lower-field motion families, but it does not yet identify a single safer runtime constant change than the existing gated timing bands.
runtimeTuningRead.nextRuntimePromotion: Use this artifact to add target bands for rack-entry duration, lower-field dive path curvature, and flagship/escort wrap timing after object-level tracking is added.
